author: Jack Valinsky
message:
feat: comprehensive git-ssb integration and protocol improvements

- Implemented full cross-repo pull request workflow with fork discovery.
- Added "Fork" button to repository UI and upstream support in data layer.
- Fixed EBT bilateral replication with per-peer clock isolation.
- Implemented causal ordering (repoBranch) in git-update messages.
- Added committer parsing and display in Git diff view.
- Improved SSB spec compliance (32-byte Bamboo entry IDs, GabbyGrove wire types).
- Added comprehensive SSBMetafeed encryption tests.
- Cleaned up debug code and misleading documentation comments.
